'''Timma Briss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. She worked as a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] at [[Boztrok]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] until she stole some important files from docking bay owner and [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Pok Nar-Ten]]. She eluded the corrupt businessman by finding work with the starship mechanic [[Bolabo Hujaan]], who worked on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]]. She was an associate of [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]].
